title: 日本ダービーの後に・今日を糧に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she misses out on first place, Special Week
still manages a superb run in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to use her loss as a learning experience
to further improve.
